title: Analyst evaluation challenge
description: Evaluate a fictional AI-generated summary against fictional source notes and identify unsupported claims.
fictionalScenario: A fictional regional office asks for a summary of three public news-style notes about a fictional supply trend.
steps: Review the fictional notes and the AI-generated summary.
Mark each AI claim as supported, unsupported, or uncertain.
Rewrite the summary with uncertainty labels and source references.
deliverable: A short claim-check table and revised nonsensitive summary.
safetyReminder: Use only the fictional material provided by the card.

title: Planning assumptions challenge
description: Use fictional planning data to compare options, surface assumptions, and decide what requires human judgment.
fictionalScenario: A fictional event team needs to compare three venue support options using nonsensitive schedule, staffing, and weather assumptions.
steps: Identify assumptions in the fictional AI-generated option comparison.
Separate factual claims from judgment calls.
List follow-up questions a human planner should resolve.
deliverable: An assumption log and human-review checklist.
safetyReminder: Do not substitute real operational plans, locations, units, or schedules.

title: Maintenance troubleshooting workflow challenge
description: Use fictional maintenance tickets to design an AI-assisted triage workflow with human review points.
fictionalScenario: A fictional facilities team has five nonsensitive service tickets about generic equipment checks.
steps: Group fictional tickets by likely cause and urgency.
Draft an AI-assisted triage prompt that uses only nonsensitive ticket text.
Add review points before any action is assigned.
deliverable: A triage prompt, workflow sketch, and review checklist.
safetyReminder: Do not use actual maintenance data, equipment identifiers, or readiness information.

title: Logistics demand-planning workflow challenge
description: Use fictional supply requests to design an AI-assisted demand review workflow with human approval points.
fictionalScenario: A fictional supply office has six nonsensitive requests for generic classroom and office materials.
steps: Group fictional requests by urgency, uncertainty, and likely follow-up needed.
Draft an AI-assisted review prompt that uses only nonsensitive request text.
Add human approval points before ordering, substitution, or priority decisions.
deliverable: A demand-review prompt, workflow sketch, and human-approval checklist.
safetyReminder: Do not use actual supply data, locations, unit names, readiness information, or operational requirements.

title: Leadership and human-approval challenge
description: Review a fictional AI-assisted recommendation and decide what must remain a human decision.
fictionalScenario: A fictional team receives an AI-generated recommendation about prioritizing three generic training requests.
steps: Identify where the AI recommendation is useful and where it overreaches.
Define approval criteria and accountability boundaries.
Write a short review note explaining the final human decision.
deliverable: A human-approval checklist and review note.

title: Trainer audience-adaptation challenge
description: Adapt fictional AI-training content for two different nonsensitive learner audiences.
fictionalScenario: A fictional training office needs a short AI safety lesson adapted for new users and experienced reviewers.
steps: Compare two fictional audience profiles.
Rewrite the lesson objective and examples for each audience.
Add a safety reminder about nonsensitive examples.
safetyReminder: Keep all examples fictional and broadly understandable.

title: Healthcare privacy and verification challenge
description: Review a fictional wellness FAQ draft for privacy, verification, and human-review concerns.
fictionalScenario: A fictional wellness office has a generic AI-drafted FAQ about hydration and sleep hygiene.
steps: Flag any claims that need authoritative verification.
Identify wording that could be mistaken for medical advice.
Rewrite the FAQ with clear limits and human-review language.
deliverable: A privacy and verification review note plus revised FAQ excerpt.
safetyReminder: Do not use real patient, clinical, or protected health information.
